sql_array: CREATE TABLE XMLTYPE_TEST (I INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, XMLVAL LONG XML);
UPDATE XMLTYPE_TEST SET XMLVAL = createXML('<emp><empno>222</empno><ename>Jane</ename></emp>') WHERE I = 1;
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename/text()').getStringVal() AS ENAME FROM XMLTYPE_TEST AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/ename') = 1;
